commands.title: AI Code Complete: Rebuild Workspace Index

aiCodeComplete.include.description: Glob pattern for files to include in indexing.

aiCodeComplete.exclude.description: Glob pattern for files to exclude from indexing.

aiCodeComplete.maxFiles.description: Maximum number of files indexed from workspace.

aiCodeComplete.maxSuggestions.description: Maximum completion candidates returned per request.

aiCodeComplete.maxTokenLength.description: Longest token length accepted while indexing.

aiCodeComplete.maxFileSizeKB.description: Skip files larger than this size during indexing.

aiCodeComplete.dataflowTopK.description: Top-K retrieved snippets from dataflow context.

aiCodeComplete.dataflowContextLines.description: How many lines before cursor are used to build dataflow query context.

aiCodeComplete.enableLmCompletion.description: Enable LM inference completion on manual invoke (Ctrl+Space).

aiCodeComplete.lmApiKey.description: API key for LM completion. If empty, OPENAI_API_KEY env will be used.

aiCodeComplete.lmModel.description: Model name used for LM completion.

aiCodeComplete.lmMaxTokens.description: Maximum tokens for LM completion output.

aiCodeComplete.backendEnabled.description: Use external Flask backend (CodeRAG) for retrieval and completion.

aiCodeComplete.backendRequestTimeoutMs.description: Timeout in milliseconds for backend requests.

aiCodeComplete.enableLogging.description: Enable verbose logs in Output panel (AI Code Complete channel).
